name: M9 刺刀（★） | 渐变大理石
nameZh: M9 刺刀（★） | 渐变大理石
descriptionEn: This is the M-9 bayonet. Originally intended to be mounted on a rifle, it is also well suited to close-quarters combat. It has been painted with black and silver metallic paints using a marbleizing medium, then candy coated in three colors. The blade is made of many colors, but soon it all looks red
descriptionZh: 这是 M-9 刺刀。起初是装在步枪上面的，其同时还非常适合近距离作战。 这把武器使用黑色和银色的金属涂料画上的仿大理石纹进行了涂装，并且外表裹上了三层颜色的糖衣。 刺刀见虹，刺刀见红
